title: Vashantor
description: Large-scale multilingual benchmark for dialect→standard Bangla machine translation. Covers five regional dialects with parallel corpora, baseline models, and evaluation scripts.

title: ANCHOLIK-NER
description: Benchmark dataset for Named Entity Recognition in five Bangla regional dialects. Developed under the IRT/SEU institutional grant (REG-NER project). Published at PLOS ONE (Q1).

title: Stock Transformer (DSE)
description: Transformer + Time2Vec architecture for stock price forecasting on the Dhaka Stock Exchange. Includes an open historical dataset, full code, and published results in World Scientific IJCIA.

title: BIDWESH
description: Bangla regional hate speech detection dataset covering dialectal variation in hateful content. Addresses a critical gap in low-resource language safety research.

title: VR-FuseNet
description: Fusion of heterogeneous fundus image data with explainable deep learning for diabetic retinopathy classification. Published at Biomedical Materials and Devices (Springer, Q2).

title: Temporal Coverage Bias in Financial Panel Data
description: Coverage-aware financial panel dataset framework and experiments demonstrating temporal coverage bias in volatility estimation.
